data.description: Travelers price target is trimmed to $318 by Jefferies from $321.
RBC reduces its target price on Wingstop Inc to $275 versus $340 earlier.
JPMorgan increases its target price on Carpenter Technology to $465 versus $394 earlier.

data.title: Bitcoin drops as US-Iran tensions escalate, falling below $74,000 after Iran's warning on a seized cargo ship.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped to under $74,000 on Sunday following Iran's warning of retaliation against the US military seizure of an Iranian cargo ship.
TD Cowen reduces its target price on Equinor to NOK 356 versus NOK 397 earlier.

data.title: AAVE drops 20% post $293M Kelp DAO hack; TVL plunges $8B. Hackers create $195M bad debt, freeze $5.1B stablecoins.
data.description: Aave's total value locked (TVL) suffered an $8 billion loss following a security breach where hackers utilized stolen funds from Kelp DAO as collateral. This incident resulted in $195 million in bad debt and caused $5.1 billion worth of stablecoins to be frozen.
TD Cowen reduces its target price on TotalEnergies to $102 versus $106 earlier.
GERMANY TO BEGIN PRIVATISATION OF SEIZED GAZPROM DIVISION- FT

data.title: The Global Economy Could Split in Very Different Directions by 2050
data.description: A recent study conducted by the BCG Henderson Institute outlines four potential scenarios for the world in the next 25 years. The analysis is based on over 100 major global trends and data from the past century. Released in April 2026, the study suggests that the global economy is facing divergent pathways with varying outcomes.
Thailand’s deputy prime minister announces plans for a law allowing 500 billion baht in government borrowing.
Thailand is considering raising its public debt ceiling, according to the deputy PM.
The yield on the 5-year Japanese government bond eases by 2 basis points to 1.815%.
Euro pares declines and moves little changed at $1.1762.

data.title: B2Gold Reports Update on Fire-Related Incident to the Crushing Circuit at the Goose Mine
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 19, 2026, B2Gold Corp. provided an update regarding the recent fire at the Goose Mine's crushing circuit that took place on the evening of April 16, 2026. The company disclosed that certain areas were affected by the incident. B2Gold, listed on the TSX as BTO, NYSE American as BTG, and NSX as B2G, outlined its near-term operational plan in response to the event. This announcement follows the news release issued by B2Gold on April 17, 2026.
BAT sees its price target reduced by AlphaValue to 4,233p, down from 4,272p.
TD Cowen increases its target price on Celestica to $350 versus $330 earlier.
Jefferies increases its target price on Prologis to $163 versus $155 earlier.
Russia’s Tuapse port is set ablaze in a “massive” Ukrainian drone attack, with one person killed, according to the regional governor.
The ECB is now seen delivering 25 bps rate hikes in June and September 2026, according to Barclays, versus prior forecasts of April and June increases.
India’s currency opens at 92.82 per dollar, slightly firmer than the last close of 92.92.
